channel.title: mysql on fhawk's blog
channel.description: Recent content in mysql on fhawk's blog

item.title: Mysql
item.description: Common commands Add user: create user 'username'@'localhost' identified by 'password'; Query users: select User from mysql.user; Grant user: grant all privileges on databasename.tablename to 'username'@'localhost'; Query privileges: show grants for 'username'; Change password: set password for username@localhost = password(‘password’); Delete user: drop user username;
item.content:
Common commands

  • Add user: create user 'username'@'localhost' identified by 'password';
  • Query users: select User from mysql.user;
  • Grant user: grant all privileges on databasename.tablename to 'username'@'localhost';
  • Query privileges: show grants for 'username';
  • Change password: set password for username@localhost = password(‘password’);
  • Delete user: drop user username;
